title: In Sierra Leone, a New Maternal Hospital Aims to be the Blueprint
summary_full: The country has one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the world. Isata Dumbuya, a nurse and midwife, has made it her mission to change that.
summary_public: The country has one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the world. Isata Dumbuya, a nurse and midwife, has made it her mission to change that.
